session.assistant: I'll run the prettier check command for those two files.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Check prettier formatting for skill and documentation files

session.tool_result:
Exit code 1 [[33mwarn[39m] .claude/skills/cli-push-down/SKILL.md [[33mwarn[39m] Code style issues found in the above file. Run Prettier with --write to fix.
Checking formatting...
session.assistant:
prettier failed: 1 file needs formatting
**File with formatting issues:** - .claude/skills/cli-push-down/SKILL.md
The file `docs/developer/agentic-engineering-patterns/README.md` passed the check, but `.claude/skills/cli-push-down/SKILL.md` needs to be reformatted using `prettier --write`.
